response:
```sql
SELECT v.status, COUNT(v.visit_id) AS visit_count
FROM app.visits v
JOIN app.patients p ON p.patient_id = v.patient_id AND p.sponsor_id = v.sponsor_id
JOIN app.studies st ON st.study_id = p.study_id
WHERE st.code = 'MOON-2026' AND v.sponsor_id = :sponsor
GROUP BY v.status
ORDER BY visit_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
```
